title: StudyPath Offline Learning Plan Builder ICC

scenario.learner_goal: Prepare for an introductory Python assessment in 21 days.

goals.label: offline_learning_plan
goals.description: Create a local-only study plan, practice queue, and progress tracker for a 21-day introductory Python preparation window.

constraints.label: local_only_storage
constraints.assertion: Learner profile, progress state, study plan, and practice queue must be stored locally.

constraints.label: no_runtime_cloud
constraints.assertion: Core runtime study planning and practice flows must not require cloud services.

constraints.label: no_analytics
constraints.assertion: No analytics SDK, telemetry pipeline, or hidden tracking may be declared.

constraints.label: deadline_21_days
constraints.assertion: Generated sessions must fit within the 21-day preparation window and declared weekday/weekend availability.

constraints.label: deterministic_local_adaptation
constraints.assertion: Adaptation may use only local progress state and deterministic local rules.

constraints.label: synthetic_curriculum_only
constraints.assertion: Curriculum content must be synthetic, demo-only, and not aligned to a real exam board.

constraints.label: accessibility_baseline
constraints.assertion: Targets must declare readable typography, contrast support, short sessions, screen-reader labels, keyboard access, and reduced motion.

constraints.label: permissions_minimality
constraints.assertion: Target briefs must not request permissions beyond local app storage, user-initiated export, and accessibility-safe UI requirements.

constraints.label: cross_platform_consistency
constraints.assertion: Android, Web, and Windows target briefs must preserve the same privacy, curriculum, progress-state, and accessibility constraints.

risks_accepted.label: device_storage_boundary
risks_accepted.description: AICL can require local-only storage, but cannot guarantee physical device security outside the generated app boundary.

risks_accepted.label: materializer_dependent_accessibility
risks_accepted.description: AICL can require accessibility constraints and target declarations, but final rendered accessibility depends on target materializers and platform implementation.
